---
title: "New Lab Space"
description: "The lab moves to a new space"
author: "PADLAB"
date: "02/01/2026"
---

In February 2026, the Perception, Action, and Development Lab moved into a newly-renovated, larger lab space in the basement of Olmsted Hall, Room A0130. 

![Behavioral Testing Room](2026-images/testing-room.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="left"}

![Remote Eye Tracking Room](2026-images/et-room.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="left"}
